title: [Feature] Native CORS Handling for Authorized Domains
body: Automatically intercept OPTIONS requests and inject CORS headers into proxy responses. Instead of using a wildcard (*), dynamically validate the incoming `Origin` header against the gateway's configured root domains (e.g., `lfr-demo.se`). If it matches, mirror the Origin back in the `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header.

issues.title: Backend: Implement Secure CORS Proxy Injection
issues.body: Modify `pkg/server/proxy.go` to intercept `OPTIONS` requests and inject `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` (restricted to configured domains), `Access-Control-Allow-Methods`, and `Access-Control-Allow-Headers`.
